proposal.working_title: AI Labs Explained: How Internal Innovation Hubs Turn AI Pilots Into Production Wins
proposal.one_line_angle: Most enterprise AI pilots stall because there is no operational home for them; an internal AI lab is the missing bridge between strategic planning and production deployment, and this post explains the three lab archetypes, the staffing model, and the 90-day path from MVP to first shipped workflow.
outline_bullets: What an internal AI lab actually does (and the innovation-theater patterns to avoid)
The three AI lab archetypes: research, product, and enablement, and how to pick yours
A 90-day blueprint for staffing, governance, and shipping the first production workflow
